case_title: JOSE L. SALAZAR VS. RAPHAEL REYES et al

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A DOMESTIC CORPORATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, JOSE L. AS TO DEFENDANT CRETE CARRIER CORPORATION
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO RAPHAEL REYES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-03-2010 AT 6:30PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, JOSE L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRETE CARRIER CORPORATION $3,295.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,395.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE ONLY; PLAINTIFF WITHDREW HIS PERSONAL INJURY CLAIM AT THE TIME OF TRIAL. DEFENDANT RAPHAEL REYES DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - NO INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO ALLOW SERVICE ON SECRETARY OF STATE FOR A DOMESTIC CORPORATION. REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
CORRESPONDENCE FROM SECRETARY OF STATE INFORMING THE COURT THAT ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER WAS SERVED (SERVICE FEE $50.00) AS TO DEFENDANT CRETE CARRIER CORPORATION
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SALAZAR, JOSE L. AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, RAPHAEL CRETE CARRIER CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-03-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-05-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, JOSE L. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RAPHAEL REYES , WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO APPEARANCE BY CO-DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CRETE CARRIER CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALAZAR, JOSE L.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.
